keyPoints: Understand the problem domain and user needs (MOTHER CARE)
Reveal the information needed to analyze the requirements (RAINBOW)
Use Case (U) diagrams to capture the functional requirements
Classes (C) and objects to model the internal structure of the system
Associations (A) and relationships to model how the classes interact
Inheritance (I) to model the relationships between classes
Aggregation (N) and composition to model the relationships between classes
Boundary (B) and behavior to model the external interactions of the system
